ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., stock, bond) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the asset */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the asset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the asset is denominated */,
  "last_trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the last trade for the asset */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the asset */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Average daily trading volume of the asset */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance level of the portfolio (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "investment_goal" TEXT /* Investment goal of the portfolio (e.g., growth, income, balanced) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio manager */,
  "benchmark_index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark index used to evaluate the portfolio's performance */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_benchmark_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_assets" (
  "portfolio_asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio-asset relationship */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the asset in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the asset was purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset held in the portfolio */,
  "last_valuation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last valuation of the asset in the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the asset in the portfolio */,
  "cost_basis" REAL /* Total cost basis of the asset in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_assets_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_assets_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "returns" REAL /* Annualized returns of the asset */,
  "risk" REAL /* Risk (volatility) of the asset */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the asset */,
  "max_returns" REAL /* Maximum returns of the asset */,
  "min_returns" REAL /* Minimum returns of the asset */,
  "median_returns" REAL /* Median returns of the asset */,
  "total_return" REAL /* Total return of the asset */,
  "average_return_yearly" REAL /* Average yearly return of the asset */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for which the metrics are calculated (e.g., 1-year, 5-year) */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the asset */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha of the asset */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the asset's returns */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data point */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the asset */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the asset on the date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset on the date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the asset */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the asset traded on the date */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the asset */,
  "dividends" REAL /* Dividends paid on the date */,
  "splits" REAL /* Stock splits on the date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "portfolio_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio performance metric */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "returns" REAL /* Annualized returns of the portfolio */,
  "risk" REAL /* Risk (volatility) of the portfolio */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the portfolio */,
  "max_returns" REAL /* Maximum returns of the portfolio */,
  "min_returns" REAL /* Minimum returns of the portfolio */,
  "median_returns" REAL /* Median returns of the portfolio */,
  "total_return" REAL /* Total return of the portfolio */,
  "average_return_yearly" REAL /* Average yearly return of the portfolio */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for which the metrics are calculated (e.g., 1-year, 5-year) */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the portfolio */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha of the portfolio */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the portfolio's returns */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the transaction occurred */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset traded */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the transaction */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission paid for the transaction */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the transaction (e.g., broker, internal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_transactions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_transactions_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the manager (e.g., portfolio manager, analyst) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the manager belongs to */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the manager has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., portfolio manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio (if applicable) */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset (if applicable) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market index */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the index is denominated */,
  "last_trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the last trade for the index */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Average daily trading volume of the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_performance" (
  "index_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index performance metric */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index */,
  "returns" REAL /* Annualized returns of the market index */,
  "risk" REAL /* Risk (volatility) of the market index */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the market index */,
  "max_returns" REAL /* Maximum returns of the market index */,
  "min_returns" REAL /* Minimum returns of the market index */,
  "median_returns" REAL /* Median returns of the market index */,
  "total_return" REAL /* Total return of the market index */,
  "average_return_yearly" REAL /* Average yearly return of the market index */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for which the metrics are calculated (e.g., 1-year, 5-year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_performance_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the indicator data */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the indicator is reported (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator data point */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator on the date */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data point was reported (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)
